description: Style NoteWingtip brogueing on tapering leather loafers for men is the latest tongue-in-cheek statement from arrow at more conventional styles. These slip-on shoes add a roguish twist to your conventional formal ensemble.Product DetailsBrown shoe with leather upper, overlays and perforationsSlip on styling with elasticated seams for ease of wearabilityPadded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upperTPU outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
